xwikidoc.name: MCPServerConfigSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #set ($discard = $xwiki.jsx.use('AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfigSheet')) #set ($discard = $xwiki.jsx.use('AI.MCP.Code.MCPSpacePickerJSX')) #set ($discard = $xwiki.ssx.use('AI.MCP.Code.MCPSpacePickerSSX')) #set ($redirect = $xwiki.relativeRequestURL) #set ($configDocRef = 'AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfig') #set ($configClassName = 'AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfigClass') #set ($configDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($configDocRef)) #set ($configObject = $configDoc.getObject($configClassName)) #set ($isMainWiki = $services.wiki.currentWikiId == $services.wiki.mainWikiId) ## Auto-create the XObject on first access (e.g. after installing the extension without defaults) #if ($xcontext.action == 'admin' && "$!configObject" == '') #set ($configObject = $configDoc.newObject($configClassName)) #set ($discard = $configDoc.save('Created MCP server configuration', true)) #end ## Seed the displayed default for the unset enabled switch on subwikis (unticked). The main wiki manages ## enable/disable through the dashboard below and does not render this switch. The Java reader remains the ## source of truth at request time; this only affects the subwiki admin form display. #if (!$isMainWiki && "$!configObject" != '' && "$!configObject.getProperty('enabled').value" == '') #set ($discard = $configObject.set('enabled', 0)) #end #set ($configClass = $xwiki.getDocument($configClassName).getxWikiClass()) {{info}} $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.security.notice') $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.security.notice.reach') $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.security.notice.filters') {{/info}} {{html clean="false"}}
#if (!$isMainWiki)
$configClass.get('enabled').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('enabled', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
#end
$configClass.get('serverName').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('serverName', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
$configClass.get('serverDescription').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('serverDescription', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
## Per-wiki tool toggles: a category-grouped checkbox tree submitted by the identity form's Save. The tools ## map to the object's enabledTools list property via the platform field name below. Category checkboxes have ## no name (UI only); each non-mandatory tool posts under that field; mandatory tools post via a hidden input ## so enabledTools is always present and the list is always updated. #set ($toolFieldName = "${configClassName}_${configObject.number}_enabledTools") #set ($toolStates = $services.mcp.getToolStates($services.wiki.currentWikiId))

$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.tools.heading'))

$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.tools.intro'))

#set ($lastCat = '') #foreach ($state in $toolStates) #set ($cat = $state.category) #if ($cat != $lastCat) #if ($lastCat != '') #end
#set ($lastCat = $cat) #end
#if ("$!state.summary" != '') $escapetool.xml($state.summary)#end
#end #if ($lastCat != '')
#end
$configClass.get('allowRenderedContent').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('allowRenderedContent', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
## Space/document picker. Each reference is submitted as its own atomic hidden input under the multi-value list ## property field name, so references containing spaces are stored verbatim instead of being split on the list ## separator. An always-present empty baseline input guarantees the field is posted: with zero chips the list is ## cleared, and with a single chip the value still arrives as a multi-value array (never re-parsed/split). #set ($spacesField = "${configClassName}_${configObject.number}_spaceFilterSpaces") #set ($docsField = "${configClassName}_${configObject.number}_spaceFilterDocuments") #set ($spacesProp = $configObject.getProperty('spaceFilterSpaces')) #set ($docsProp = $configObject.getProperty('spaceFilterDocuments')) #set ($storedSpaces = []) #if ("$!spacesProp" != '' && $spacesProp.value) #set ($storedSpaces = $spacesProp.value) #end #set ($storedDocs = []) #if ("$!docsProp" != '' && $docsProp.value) #set ($storedDocs = $docsProp.value) #end #set ($removeLabel = $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.remove')) #set ($mcpReachOn = $services.mcp.isCrossWikiReach($services.wiki.currentWikiId))
$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.additionalFilters.heading'))

$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.heading'))

$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.intro'))

#if ($mcpReachOn)

$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.crossWikiHint'))

#end
$configClass.get('spaceFilterMode').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('spaceFilterMode', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.spaces.label'))
#foreach ($ref in $storedSpaces) $escapetool.xml($ref) #end $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.empty'))
$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.documents.label'))
#foreach ($ref in $storedDocs) $escapetool.xml($ref) #end $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.empty'))
{{/html}} {{documentTree id="mcp-space-picker-tree" links="false" checkboxes="true" finder="true" showRoot="false" showWikis="$mcpReachOn" showSpaces="true" showAttachments="false" showTranslations="false" /}} {{html clean="false"}}
{{/html}} ## Farm dashboard: shown only on the main wiki. Lists every wiki with a checkbox reflecting its real MCP ## enabled state and applies the chosen states in one action. The cross-wiki write is gated per wiki in ## $services.mcp. #if ($isMainWiki) ## The admin section id of the per-wiki MCP config. MUST match the displayInSection value of the ## ConfigurableClass object in AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfig (currently "MCP Server"). If the Configure ## links 404 after deploy, this is the only value to adjust. #set ($mcpSectionId = 'MCP Server') ## Cross-wiki reach is a farm-level grant: only a main-wiki admin may toggle it. Subwiki admins see the ## read-only status in the reach column. #set ($canFarmAdmin = $services.mcp.canFarmAdmin()) ## Handle the apply POST in place. Require POST so this state change is never reachable via a GET (which ## would leak the CSRF token through the URL in logs/Referer and run on link prefetch). #if ($request.method == 'POST' && $request.get('do') == 'mcpApply') #if (!$services.csrf.isTokenValid($request.get('form_token'))) {{error}}$services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.error.csrf'){{/error}} #else #set ($result = $services.mcp.applyEnabled($request.getParameterValues('mcpManaged'), $request.getParameterValues('mcpEnabled'))) #set ($reachResult = $services.mcp.applyReach($request.getParameterValues('mcpReachManaged'), $request.getParameterValues('mcpReach'))) #set ($totalChanged = $result.changed + $reachResult.changed) #if ($result.skipped > 0) {{info}}$services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.applied.skipped', [$totalChanged, $result.skipped]){{/info}} #else {{info}}$services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.applied', [$totalChanged]){{/info}} #end #end #end == $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.heading') == $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.intro') {{html clean="false"}}
#foreach ($w in $services.wiki.getAll()) #set ($wikiName = "$!w.prettyName") #if ($wikiName == '') #set ($wikiName = $w.id) #end #set ($canAdmin = $services.mcp.canAdmin($w.id)) #set ($enabled = $services.mcp.isEnabled($w.id)) #end
$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.enabled')) $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.reach')) $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.wiki')) $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.configure'))
#if ($canAdmin)#else#if ($enabled)$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.enabled'))#else$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.disabled'))#end#end #if ($canFarmAdmin)#else#if ($services.mcp.isCrossWikiReach($w.id))$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.enabled'))#else$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.disabled'))#end#end $escapetool.xml($wikiName) #if ($canAdmin)#set ($configRef = $services.model.createDocumentReference($w.id, 'XWiki', 'XWikiPreferences'))$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.configure.link'))#end
{{/html}} #end {{/velocity}}
